NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON OEX WAS FILED IN COURT. DEBTOR WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES STIPULATED ON A CONTINUANCE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-12-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-11-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO SUBMIT TO INSURANCE COMPANY; IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
